title: Fresh Cell Isolation RNA Extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"t2t2","text":"This protocol describes the process of extracting RNA from freshly isolated immune cell populations using the Qiagen RNeasy Mini Kit. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"aebr","text":"Always wear gloves and spray with RNaseZap and spread solution all over gloves.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"efnnn","text":"Make sure to use RNA only pipettes and filter tips.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sn9i","text":"Perform all steps of the procedure at room temperature. During the procedure, work quickly. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8rfoo","text":"Perform all centrifugation steps at 20–25°C in a standard microcentrifuge. Ensure that the centrifuge does not\ncool below 20°C. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"t8p1","text":"Prepare BME lysis buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2aj6","text":"Add 20 μl β-ME per 1 ml Buffer RLT. Dispense in a fume hood. Buffer RLT containing β-ME can be stored at room temperature for up to 1 month. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"54c4k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ap1as","text":"Prepare RPE buffer   \nAdd 4 volumes of ethanol (96–100%) as indicated on the bottle to concentrate buffer RPE to obtain a working Solution. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"cv8tn","text":"Wear appropriate PPE and work with concentrated β-ME and ethanol in a chemical safety hood. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5149l","text":"RNeasy mini kit (74106, Qiagen) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4npqp","text":"QIAshredder (79656, Qiagen)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7uscr","text":"96-100% Ethanol ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"auj28","text":"Nuclease Free Water (AM9938,Thermo Scientific) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ci6g","text":"2-mercaptoethanol (M6250, Sigma Aldrich)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8dtp9","text":"RNaseZAP(AM9780, Ambion) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5s3ma","text":"1.5ml tubes ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1jrqc","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7khno","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Resuspend cell pellet in 350uL of BME+RLT lysis buffer and vortex well.
Transfer lysis solution to (purple) qiashredder tubes and then spin 21300xg (full speed) for 2min.
Add 350uL of 70% ethanol to the homogenized lysate, and mix well by pipetting.
Can freeze flow-through of cell lysate at this stage and store in -80 degrees celsius for several months

Transfer 700 μl of the sample, including any precipitate that may have formed, to an RNeasy spin column placed in a 2 ml collection tube. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 30s at 9,391xg (10,000rpm). Discard the flow-through .
Add 700 μL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 30s at 9,391xg (10,000 rpm) to wash the spin column membrane. Discard the flow-through.
Add 500 μl Buffer RPE to the RNeasy spin column. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 30s at 9,391xg (10,000rpm) to wash the spin column membrane. Discard the flow-through.
Spin for 2 minutes at full speed to ensure any residual buffers are gone.

Place the RNeasy spin column in a new 1.5 ml collection tube. Add 20μl RNase-free water directly to the spin column membrane. Close the lid gently, and centrifuge for 1 min at 9,391xg (10,000rpm) to elutethe RNA.

After first spin transfer elution back to the membrane of the RNeasyspin column and spin again for 1 min at 9,391xg (10,000rpm) (re-elution results ingreater RNA yield). Samples are now ready for downstream assays or should be stored at -80 degrees.
creator: Janna Jernigan Posey
